Hey, welcome back and welcome to the module on advanced tonality, which is going to be one of your favorites for sure. And certainly one of the modules that's going to be a game changer for you in terms of closing more sales. Now, if you recall, at the beginning of the unconscious communication module, I made a reference to it being the hidden language or the secret weapon of influence. Well, now you're going to find out exactly why. Here's the deal. There are 10 core tonalities, 10 core influencing tonalities, right? And we use these tonalities again and again and again as in what prospects down the straight line from the open to the close. But what happens when you use these tonalities? What happens to the prospects in mind? What do they hear? What do they feel in their gut when they're applied correctly? Let me give you an example. If I say to you, hi, John, how are you today? You hear the words, hi, John, how are you today? And that's all you hear, right? But what if I do this and, hi, John, how are you doing today? You're like, oh, okay. Like, wow, he really wants to know. He really cares. In other words, same words, but by applying a very intense tonality, you actually hear extra words and a force to process those words logically. So what ends up happening is, is that when you typically speak to someone and they speak in neutral tonalities, you listen to them and you also narrate what they're saying simultaneously. Like, mm-hmm, I agree with that. Now he's an ass. He's like, oh, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, stupid salesman. Yeah, oh, yeah, he's a chocolate truth. No, he's lying. You actually have your own conversation with yourself as you'll see someone else speak. But when you start layering on tonalities one after the next, after the next, they hear all these extra words and they are forced to keep up with that and it paralyzes their inner monologue. And because of that, it allows you to take immediate and complete control of it and get into the sale and start the process of building rapport and ultimately closing the deal. In other words, let me give you an example here. In the beginning of a sale, very typical situation is someone say, you know, hey, Jordan Belfort calling from XYZ company. How you doing today? Now watch. I say, hi, this is Jordan Belfort calling neutral tonight from XYZ company. How are you today? Neutral, neutral, neutral. You're like, oh my God, here we go. Another salesperson. And I'm done. Like before I even start, like, what am I doing here? I'm having to get through this by screen. You always want to hang up the phone already. But what if I say it like this? I said, hey, John, Jordan Belfort, question mark, calling from XYZ company, question mark in New York. How you doing today? You're like, what? Who knows? What I did there is I used the tonality called phrasing a declarative as a question. I made a statement, but I phrase it as a question. And because of that, it sends your mind into search mode. You're like, do I know Jordan Belfort? I don't want to be out of the loop here because my mom told me when I was five, that's very rude and I hate to piss someone off or be sort of a fool. I don't want to have a bad memory. So you'll be like, aha, yes. You give me the benefit of the doubt. And then while you're still making sense of that, I say, how you doing today? And you're like, whoa, he really wants to. So then more words pile in. Before you know it, through the stacking of tonality, tonality, tonality, the person's just in your magnetic zone, hang on your every word and you're in complete control of the sale. That's the power of advanced tonality. Now I just gave you one tonality called phrasing a declarative as a question. It's one of our core tonalities. But now I'm going to do in these following lessons and I'm going to go through them very systematically one by one and give you all 10, give you examples. And then in each of these lessons, there'll be a resource center. Besides just your normal quizzes, there'll be a resource center. So you make sure you really lock these in and go through exercises to perfect these tonalities. They're so important. All right. So that's the deal. Let's get rolling into these lessons. This is going to be a game changer. So please take the time to really master this stuff. And I will see you in the next lesson. No quiz right now. Just rock on.
